title: NanoMirai
body:
# NanoMirai

[日本語](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/NanoMirai/blob/master/README_ja.md)

NanoMirai is a Minecraft mod based on nanotechnology. You can use nanomachines to enhance yourself and generate various resources.

## Items Added

### Synth Nano ![synth_nano.png](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/NanoMirai/raw/8af247007d58a7b9005f90f88bd627f54f2e6436/src/main/resources/assets/nanomirai/textures/item/synthesize_nano.png)

A nanomachine that transforms various blocks using catalysts. ![synth_nano_crafting.gif](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/NanoMirai/raw/8af247007d58a7b9005f90f88bd627f54f2e6436/assets/synthesize_nano.gif)

### Support Nano ![support_nano.png](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/NanoMirai/raw/8af247007d58a7b9005f90f88bd627f54f2e6436/src/main/resources/assets/nanomirai/textures/item/support_nano.png)

Nanomachines that connect to the player to enhance abilities.

### Nano Swarm Blaster ![nano_swarm_blaster.png](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/NanoMirai/raw/8af247007d58a7b9005f90f88bd627f54f2e6436/src/main/resources/assets/nanomirai/textures/item/nano_swarm_blaster.png)

A weapon that fires swarms of nanomachines to apply debuffs to enemies.

### Nanomachine Assembler ![nanomachine_assembler.png](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/NanoMirai/raw/8af247007d58a7b9005f90f88bd627f54f2e6436/src/main/resources/assets/nanomirai/textures/block/nanomachine_assembler_front.png)

A dedicated machine for assembling nanomachines.

### Laser Engraver ![laser_engraver.png](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/NanoMirai/raw/8af247007d58a7b9005f90f88bd627f54f2e6436/src/main/resources/assets/nanomirai/textures/block/laser_engraver_front.png)

A machine that processes various items with lasers to convert them into other items. ![laser_engraver.webp](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/NanoMirai/raw/8af247007d58a7b9005f90f88bd627f54f2e6436/assets/laser_engraver.webp)

### Nano Lab ![nano_lab.png](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/NanoMirai/raw/8af247007d58a7b9005f90f88bd627f54f2e6436/src/main/resources/assets/nanomirai/textures/block/nano_lab_front.png)

A research facility for granting special effects to nanomachines.

## ![nano_lab.webp](https://github.com/BlueSheep2804/NanoMirai/raw/8af247007d58a7b9005f90f88bd627f54f2e6436/assets/nano_lab.webp)

## Prerequisite Mods

*   Kotlin for Forge
*   Curios API
*   JEI (optional but recommended)
